{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Aethertech weapon
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|An [[Aethertech weapon]] can gather and compress conjured water from the [[Aether]] and accelerate the spell to just under lightspeed.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
